name: bleu
description: Bleu - Claude Code plugin for living blueprints. Turns ideas into a file-backed markdown wiki (vision, architecture, ADRs, action points) that survives /clear and hands off to GSD or Superpowers.

plugins.name: bleu
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for living blueprints. Turn an idea into a deeply structured, lint-passing, file-backed system plan before writing any code.
